headline: Is O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Pricing In Too Much Growth After Recent Share Price Recovery?
summary: If you are wondering whether O'Reilly Automotive at around US$92.27 is offering good value today, the key is to separate share price moves from what the company might actually be worth. The stock has returned 5.0% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return sits at a 2.2% decline and the year to date return is 2.1%, with a 1 year return of a 2.8% decline and longer term 3 and 5 year returns of 64.5% and 172.5% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on O'Reilly Automotive as a large US...
